title: Internet Explorer 11 Version 11.0.9600.19596 on Windows 7 Support
excerpt:
HI All, 
In our Outlook integration we open an OAuth window to connect with monday, and it fails on IE11 on Windows 7 (Microsoft was kind enough to let us know) please see below :   
Is there a way to fix this?

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI All,

In our Outlook integration we open an OAuth window to connect with monday, and it fails on IE11 on Windows 7 (Microsoft was kind enough to let us know) please see below :

image777×878 23 KB

Is there a way to fix this?

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Attached a link to the video the sent as well:
https://partner.microsoft.com/dashboard/windows/api/certweb/report/reviewFiles/46a97c94-b9e9-40c1-9459-bdcf1a87e604

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YossiT,

I do want to let you know that monday.com is no longer supported on Internet Explorer 11. I would recommend using Chrome or a different browser!

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Helen,

Will it be possible to display a graceful message saying that in the Auth page instead of the unaccessible fields?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YossiT,

You can use our API to send a notification to the user within their monday.com screen letting them know that IE 11 is not supported.

If your app is a view app, you can also display the message within the iframe of your view app!

posts.author: YossiT (yossi  turgeman)
posts.cookedHtml: OK. Thank you Helen, You are the best!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
